mapper.select: SELECT au.admin_id, au.username, au.name, au.email, au.phone, au.status_code, au.last_login_at, au.created_at, ar.role_id, ar.role_code, ar.role_name FROM ADMIN_USERS au LEFT JOIN ADMIN_USER_ROLES aur ON au.admin_id = aur.admin_id AND aur.deleted_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN ADMIN_ROLES ar ON aur.role_id = ar.role_id AND ar.deleted_yn = 'N' WHERE au.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY ar.role_id ASC, au.admin_id ASC

SELECT au.admin_id, au.username, au.name, au.email, au.phone, au.status_code, au.last_login_at, au.created_at, ar.role_id, ar.role_code, ar.role_name FROM ADMIN_USERS au LEFT JOIN ADMIN_USER_ROLES aur ON au.admin_id = aur.admin_id AND aur.deleted_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN ADMIN_ROLES ar ON aur.role_id = ar.role_id AND ar.deleted_yn = 'N' WHERE au.admin_id = #{adminId} AND au.deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ADMIN_USERS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ADMIN_USERS ( admin_id, username, password_hash, name, email, phone, status_code, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{passwordHash, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, 'ACTIVE', SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', #{createdBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ADMIN_USERS SET status_code = #{statusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM ADMIN_ROLES WHERE role_code = #{roleCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ADMIN_USERS WHERE username = #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} AND deleted_yn = 'N'

SELECT ap.permission_code FROM ADMIN_USER_ROLES aur JOIN ROLE_PERMISSIONS rp ON aur.role_id = rp.role_id AND rp.deleted_yn = 'N' JOIN ADMIN_PERMISSIONS ap ON rp.permission_id = ap.permission_id AND ap.deleted_yn = 'N' WHERE aur.admin_id = #{adminId} AND aur.deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADMIN_USER_ROLES ( admin_user_role_id, admin_id, role_id, assigned_at, assigned_by, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( SEQ_ADMIN_USER_ROLES.NEXTVAL, #{adminId}, #{roleId}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', #{createdBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'N' )
